---
name: Performance optimisation
about: Suggest a performance improvement or optimisation for the project
title: "[PERF] "
labels: perf
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
Describe the performance issue or optimisation you are suggesting.

## Current behaviour
Explain how the system currently behaves and what performance problem you observed.

## Expected behaviour
Describe the improved behaviour or performance goal.

## Proposed optimisation
Outline the specific change(s) or approach you recommend.

## Evidence
If applicable, include benchmark data, profiling results, or other evidence.

## Notes
Optionally add any other context or tradeoffs to consider.
